operating_model.summary: Codex sole LO; Claude Code/AGY sequential read-only external workers; strict read-only bridges fail closed unless Codex LO/user-approved runtime permission allows adapter execution.

lo_configuration.outbound_request_enforcement: Enforced by Codex LO dispatch and sequential policy; this is not a global adapter lock.

runtime_approval_boundary.external_adapter_execution: Requires Codex LO/user-approved runtime permission; execution is not guaranteed inside the strict read-only bridge sandbox.
runtime_approval_boundary.fail_closed: If the runtime cannot execute the adapter, the bridge must not self-escalate, prompt or contact the user, or weaken its sandbox; it returns BLOCK to Codex LO with the exact attempted command and runtime evidence.
runtime_approval_boundary.observed_probe: A local Codex strict :read-only probe blocked mktemp /tmp as expected; parent approval/runtime permission is therefore a prerequisite for live adapter dispatch.

claude-advisor.role: one-shot built-in Fable advisor review in fresh Claude session

hard_gates.final_dataset: Final dataset is fixed: 2024-07..12 Raw, 184 daily records_YYYYMMDD.parquet files plus 500k eligibility; no 2025-01 acquisition.
hard_gates.hana_schema: HANA schema/table/column names must never be guessed; use confirmed sources only.
hard_gates.environment: Windows production is closed-network; Python 3.12 dev/prod parity is required.
hard_gates.shared_constants: _PID_BATCH_T30 and strata_utils._DEFAULT_AGE_BINS must not be redefined.
hard_gates.bat_files: BAT files must preserve CRLF and include chcp 65001; AGY sign-off is required.
hard_gates.feature_temp_preflight: Temp destination priority: HANA_FEAT_TMP -> HANA_TMP_DIR -> hana_config.json -> system temp; require 10GB+ free space.
hard_gates.train_serving_parity: RequestFeatureBuilder feature names and order must match training exactly; serving changes require a training schema diff, tests/test_serving, tests/test_features, /reload, and sample payload sanity checks.
hard_gates.protected_path_policy: Protected paths may not be modified, deleted, or committed without explicit user approval.
hard_gates.research_track: RESEARCH_TRACK_FROZEN; no Nov->Dec tuning, ablation, feature, or hyperparameter work; Gate 5A, Gate 5B, and 2025-01 are retired.

validation_commands.toml_json_parse: /mnt/c/model/mode_11_hana/.venv_wsl/bin/python -c "import json, pathlib, tomllib; json.load(open('.agents/agents_config.json', encoding='utf-8')); [tomllib.loads(pathlib.Path(path).read_text(encoding='utf-8')) for path in ('.codex/config.toml', '.codex/agents/claude-bridge.toml', '.codex/agents/agy-bridge.toml')]"
validation_commands.active_policy_search: if rg -n -i 'open[c]ode|Hermes L[O]|Claude L[O]' AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md .claude/settings.json .agents .codex .claude/agents; then exit 1; else status=$?; if [ "$status" -eq 1 ]; then exit 0; fi; exit "$status"; fi
validation_commands.protected_diff:
set -o pipefail
pathspecs=(packages_win/py312/ mlruns/ out/ ':(glob)*.parquet' ':(glob)**/*.parquet' ':(glob)*.bat' ':(glob)**/*.bat')
collect_changes() {
  git diff --name-only HEAD -- "${pathspecs[@]}" || return $?
  git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "${pathspecs[@]}" || return $?
  if git show-ref --verify --quiet refs/heads/main; then
    git diff --name-only main...HEAD -- "${pathspecs[@]}" || return $?
  else
    status=$?
    if [ "$status" -ne 1 ]; then return "$status"; fi
  fi
}
changes="$(collect_changes | sort -u)" || exit $?
if [ -n "$changes" ]; then
  printf '%s\n' "$changes"
  exit 1
fi
exit 0
